infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SkyLink uses your camera to stream live video to your peer.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SkyLink uses your microphone for walkie-talkie voice communication.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SkyLink shares your GPS location with your peer in real time.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: SkyLink lets you share your contacts with your connected peer.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SkyLink saves received files and photos to your library.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: SkyLink saves received media to your photo library.

plugins.cameraPermission: SkyLink uses your camera to stream live video to your peer.
plugins.microphonePermission: SkyLink uses your microphone for walkie-talkie voice.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: SkyLink shares your GPS location with your peer.

plugins.photosPermission: SkyLink saves received media to your photo library.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: SkyLink saves received photos to your library.

plugins.contactsPermission: SkyLink lets you share contacts with your peer.
